template: Hey [Name], this is [Your Name]. I saw you're [context] and wanted to see if you need help [value_proposition]. I do [offer_name] - [key_benefits]. Do you have [time] to see if this makes sense?
example: Hey [Name], this is [Your Name]. I saw you're launching a course and wanted to see if you need help getting launch-ready fast. I do done-for-you launch kits in 48 hours - landing page, emails, traffic plan, the works. Do you have 3 minutes to see if this makes sense?
